Name: Average time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Total time between SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and the first occurrence of SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-Reviewer Agreed to occur after SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average duration of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection when followed by SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week versus when followed directly by SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week'

Name: Time elapsed from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that include at least one SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection in cases that eventually lead to SW-EIC Accept compared to those leading to SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Average time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to the first reviewer-related outcome (SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, or SW-Reviewer No Response)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time between SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and SW-Reviewer Selection is now due across all process variants
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due'

Name: Time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in submissions requiring multiple revision rounds
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Average time it takes SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to be completed before any reminder activity (e.g., Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1) occurs
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Total time between SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and SW-Reviewer Agreed in cases where no reviewer declined versus cases with at least one SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Elapsed time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to the final decision (e.g., SW-EIC Accept or SW-EIC Reject) in variants containing exactly one SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Time of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection relative to Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation in high-duration versus low-duration variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Minimum time between SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and Assign a Different Editor when editor reassignment occurs during reviewer selection
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'Assign a Different Editor'

Name: Average time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW–Major Revision due in 1 month in manuscripts undergoing major revision after initial review
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'", 'end': "activity == 'SW–Major Revision due in 1 month'", 'aggregation': 'average', 'filter': "activity == 'SW-EIC Major Revision'"}"
